title: Granville FS-XC 0W/20 Fully Synthetic Engine Oil – 1L | Engine Lubrication Oil | ACEA C5 –VCC RBS0-2AE | Superior Fuel Economy & High Performance Lubrication
features: High-Performance 0W/20 Engine Oil – Advanced fully synthetic formula designed for maximum protection and fuel efficiency in both petrol and diesel engines, naturally aspirated and turbocharged.
Complies with ACEA C5 and VCC RBS0-2AE Standards – Tailored to meet the stringent requirements of modern engines, ensuring optimal performance and longevity.
Enhanced Fuel Economy – Offers superior fluidity, which reduces friction and fuel consumption, making it a perfect choice for eco-conscious drivers.
Exceptional Low-Temperature Fluidity – Provides reliable protection during cold starts, maintaining viscosity even in extremely low temperatures down to -48°C.
Advanced Engine Protection – Formulated to handle extreme driving conditions, protecting vital engine components from wear and deposits.
Ideal for Modern Engines – Suitable for a range of high-performance engines that require a 0W/20 grade, ensuring efficient and powerful engine performance.
5-Year Shelf Life – Maintains its quality and effectiveness for up to five years when stored properly, ensuring you get the best performance out of every bottle.
description: Introduction: Granville FS-XC 0W/20 Fully Synthetic Engine Oil is engineered for top-tier performance and fuel efficiency in modern vehicles. This high-performance engine oil meets ACEA C5 and VCC RBS0-2AE standards, making it ideal for drivers seeking superior protection and enhanced fuel economy. Granville FS-XC 0W/20 is suitable for both naturally aspirated and turbocharged petrol and diesel engines, delivering outstanding fluidity, even in extreme cold, to ensure reliable protection during every drive. Benefits and Features: Enhanced Fuel Economy : Reduced friction and fuel consumption for cost-efficient driving. Superior Cold-Weather Performance : Maintains ideal viscosity down to -48°C, enabling smooth cold starts. Comprehensive Engine Protection : Protects against wear, deposits, and sludge, even under high-stress conditions. Meets Modern Engine Standards : Perfectly suited for vehicles requiring ACEA C5 and VCC RBS0-2AE specifications. Specifications: Manufacturer Specifications : ACEA C5, VCC RBS0-2AE, STJLR .03.5006 Appearance : Amber liquid Density : 0.844 @ 15°C (ASTM D792) Kinematic Viscosity at 100°C : 7.67 mm²/s (ASTM D445) Viscosity CCS at -35°C : 6200 mPa.s (ASTM D4684) Total Base Number : 8.33 mg KOH/g (ASTM D2896) Pour Point : -48°C (ASTM D97) HTHS Viscosity : 2.75 mPa.s (ASTM D4683) NOACK Volatility : 11% (ASTM D5800) Package Content: 1 x Granville FS-XC 0W/20 Fully Synthetic Engine Oil – 1L Granville FS-XC 0W/20 delivers advanced protection, fuel efficiency, and engine performance, making it a reliable choice for modern, eco-conscious drivers.
